aiFindings.description: Missing primary CTA button on homepage — no clear action for visitors to take
Weak value proposition headline — does not explain what the product does or its core benefit
Confusing visual hierarchy — competing elements with similar weight make page hard to scan
Inconsistent tone of voice across product and marketing pages
No trust indicators visible above the fold — missing testimonials or customer logos
Navigation labels overlap in meaning — users cannot distinguish between sections

humanFindings.description: No clear action button on the homepage — visitors don't know what to do next
Confusing layout — hard to tell what's most important on the page, hierarchy unclear
Headline doesn't explain what the product does — weak value proposition
Footer links are broken — several lead to 404 pages
